history.details: Vision accepted, VISION-SPEC.md created, advancing to requirements
Requirements formalized: 34 functional, 7 non-functional, 6 data, 5 integration, 12 edge cases, 5 open questions
Requirements reviewed: added FR-035 through FR-041, updated FR-009/011/013/017/018/020/025, resolved open questions #1 and #5
Requirements accepted, REQUIREMENTS-SPEC.md created, advancing to architecture. Final count: 41 functional, 7 non-functional, 6 data, 5 integration requirements

Architecture designed: npm package (3 CLI commands, ~1 dependency), markdown agents as brain, TypeScript/tsup build, surgical merge for config/state, quality loop with crash-recoverable quality_loop_state, cross-environment handoff via concert-push

Architecture reviewed: removed simple mode, removed context gating (deferred), simplified model tier routing, added branch/PR strategy (Section 9), added PR merge gate, added documentation agent to phase flow, removed Concert 1 migration, fixed conventional commits

Architecture accepted, ARCHITECTURE-SPEC.md created, advancing to UX. 17 sections covering system overview, tech stack, package structure, CLI commands, agent/workflow/skill architecture, state management, GitHub workflow generation, code quality loop, branch/PR strategy, cross-environment handoff, plan usage (deferred), model tier routing, update mechanism, documentation currency, security, trade-offs, dependency budget

UX designed: 12 sections covering design principles, user flows (6 journeys), CLI output design (3 commands), agent conversation patterns (interview/review/status/failure/redirect), WIP PR body design, terminal output conventions, agent output structure, error recovery flows, accessibility, platform conventions, cross-environment consistency, key UX decisions summary

UX reviewed: removed regression gate from execution flow (coders already run full tests, PR merge gate is the safety net), removed --force flag from init error output (intentionally omitted for v1), updated REQUIREMENTS.md and REQUIREMENTS-SPEC.md to match

UX accepted, UX-SPEC.md created, advancing to tasks. 12 sections: design principles, 6 user flows, CLI output for 3 commands, agent conversation patterns, WIP PR body design, terminal conventions, error recovery, accessibility, platform conventions, cross-environment consistency

Tasks planned: 5 phases, 31 task files (21 haiku, 10 sonnet, 0 opus). Phase 1: Foundation (3 tasks), Phase 2: Core Library (6 tasks), Phase 3: CLI Commands (4 tasks), Phase 4: Templates (14 tasks — agents, workflows, skills, GitHub stubs, CC commands), Phase 5: Integration & Testing (4 tasks)

Tasks reviewed: removed concert-run/concert-runner references, consolidated concert-continue as universal agent (state detection + execution orchestration), renamed agent-planner-runner to agent-planner, removed run.md from command list, added decomposition quality scoring to reviewer, removed planner pause between passes
Tasks accepted. 5 phases, 31 task files. Ready for execution.
Phase 1 (Foundation) complete: project scaffold, types, default templates. 3 tasks, 3 commits.
Phase 2 (Core Library) complete: config, state, git, version, copy, merge helpers. 6 tasks, 6 commits.
Phase 3 (CLI Commands) complete: cmd-init, cmd-update, cmd-push, cli-router. 4 tasks, 4 commits.
Phase 4 (Templates) complete: 15 agents, 8 workflows, 3 skills, 15 GitHub stubs, 12 Claude Code commands, 2 GitHub Actions workflows, CLAUDE.md, README. 14 tasks, 2 commits.

next_steps: Phase 5 in progress: Integration & Testing (template-validation, build-validation, e2e tests)
